mapper.select:
SELECT sp.*, s.name AS student_name, c.name AS course_name, t.name AS teacher_name FROM student_course_package sp LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON sp.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON sp.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user t ON sp.teacher_id = t.id
AND sp.student_id = #{param.studentId} AND sp.teacher_id = #{param.teacherId} AND sp.course_id = #{param.courseId} AND sp.status = #{param.status} AND sp.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.name}, '%')
ORDER BY sp.create_time DESC
